title: PM Lane 177 - Local Executor Closeout Intake Grouping
authority: repo technical authority; PM lane implementation authority; final integration authority
objective: Reduce Project Miner Temp Power executor-closeout scan burden by grouping the existing Local Executor Closeout Intake checklist without changing checklist state, candidate-scoped browser storage, export inclusion, clear behavior, disclosure behavior, or write boundaries.
scope: Grouped the existing Local Executor Closeout Intake checklist into Source and Hosted Evidence, Validation and Verdict Evidence, and Guardrails and Next Action.

Preserved the same eight checklist labels/details, checkbox behavior, candidate-scoped browser storage key, clear button behavior, export inclusion, disclosure behavior, no-disclosure-storage posture, and no-write/no-acceptance language.
Kept the Local Executor Closeout Intake disclosure behavior stateless with no executor-closeout disclosure localStorage key.
Used a read-only sidecar to verify the grouping shape and smoke hardening while VS Code Codex retained PM implementation and final integration authority.
guardrails: No Supabase, Render, Vercel, or Olares product action.
No approval POST or approval-row creation.

No field authorization, assignment, schedule/status, durable field record, production tracking, customer report, completion evidence, billing, payroll, invoice, accounting, or external finance-system write.
No new export action, export handler, filename, payload version, localStorage key, backend route, service/auth/ingress change, or autonomous AI business-state mutation.
validation: rg -n "PM Lane 177|Local executor closeout intake groups|Source and Hosted Evidence executor closeout group|Validation and Verdict Evidence executor closeout group|Guardrails and Next Action executor closeout group|mutationRequests\)\.toHaveLength\(0\)" PROJECT_STATUS.md docs/operations ops/agents apps/operations-web
validation_result: PASS - operations-web typecheck passed; focused Playwright pm import-intake smoke passed; operations-web build passed; packet JSON parsed; PM Lane 177 guardrail rg passed; git diff --check passed with only expected CRLF warnings on touched and unrelated markdown files.
sidecar_result: Read-only sidecar James recommended the three wrapper-only groups used here, with exact ARIA labels and smoke assertions for group visibility, 3/3/2 item distribution, no disclosure storage, preserved checklist behavior, and mutationRequests length 0.
